summary: Iteration 6 testing of all new public pages ported from user's GitHub repo. All 12 public pages tested successfully: Home, Pricing, Services, About, Contact, Promoting, Publishing, Stores, Leasing/Instrumentals, Terms, Privacy. Slide-out menu navigation working correctly. Contact form and Beat Request form submissions working. Admin notification bell visible (pending count badge only shows when there are pending submissions).

issues: Duplicate data-testid='contact-email' used for both contact info section and email input field - should use unique testids

passed_tests: Home page (/) loads with KALMORI header, hero animation, typewriter text
Slide-out menu opens via hamburger button (data-testid='menu-toggle')
Menu contains all page links: Home, My Releases, Pricing, Leasing, Promoting, Publishing, Our Services, About Us, Contact/Support, Stores
Menu contains Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy links
Menu Sign In button navigates to /login
Menu Create Account button navigates to /register
Pricing page (/pricing) shows 3 plans: Free, Unlimited Single, Album with GET STARTED buttons
Services page (/services) shows 4 service cards: Distribution, Analytics, Promotion, Publishing
About page (/about) shows mission, 4 value cards, and CTAs
Contact page (/contact) shows contact info (email, phone, address) and contact form
Contact form submission shows success message
Promoting page (/promoting) shows promotion channels and 3 packages: Starter, Professional, Premium
Publishing page (/publishing) shows 4 publishing services, stats, and sign-up CTA
Publishing page popup works correctly
Stores page (/stores) shows all 12 DSP stores: Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube, Amazon, TikTok, Tidal, Pandora, SoundCloud, Instagram, Audiomack, Boomplay
Leasing/Instrumentals page (/leasing) shows 4 license tiers: Basic Lease, Premium Lease, Unlimited Lease, Exclusive
Beat Request form with genre/mood selectors works correctly
Beat Request form submission shows success message
Terms page (/terms) shows all 12 sections of terms & conditions
Privacy page (/privacy) shows all 11 sections of privacy policy
Global footer appears on all public pages with correct links
Navigation between pages works via slide-out menu
Admin notification bell visible at /admin
Admin dashboard shows correct stats (0 pending submissions)
action_items: Consider using unique data-testid for contact email input field (e.g., 'contact-email-input') to avoid duplicate testid with contact info section
context_for_next_testing_agent: All public pages ported from GitHub repo are working correctly. The slide-out menu (data-testid='slide-menu') provides navigation to all pages. Contact form and Beat Request form submissions work with success messages. Admin notification bell shows pending count badge only when there are pending submissions (currently 0). The duplicate data-testid='contact-email' is a minor issue that doesn't affect functionality.
